title: Mental Health App: Growth Strategy & Positioning
summary: Growth strategy and acquisition support for a mental health app operating in a sensitive and evidence-led category.
challenge: The team needed to communicate a behaviour-change product clearly while building trust with audiences who are rightly cautious about mental health claims.
work: Clarified positioning around outcome, audience, and category context
Balanced product energy with credibility and care
Turned the growth story into practical campaign and page recommendations
results: Reusable growth messaging for campaigns and partnerships
